issues: bar height is very compact (~25-30px) which may reduce legibility on small screens
full-width span is correct but vertical footprint is at the minimum threshold for a readable status bar
reasoning: hud_top_bar_v00 is a full-width top status panel showing HP, Echo Box count, location name, and a menu button. Height occupies roughly 3-4% of screen height, which is appropriately thin for a top HUD bar and does not compete with the gameplay viewport. Proportionally it sits well against the 32x32 player scale — it is a flat UI overlay, not a world-space object, so direct size comparison to entities is N/A. The panel does not produce a 'wallpaper' feel; it reads as a compact functional chrome strip. Perspective is flat/orthographic consistent with the top-down 2D scene. No item-larger-than-player violation, no perspective mismatch, no scene overwhelm. Main concern is the minimal bar height making text very small relative to bottom action buttons (召唤/攻击 ~70px tall), creating slight vertical hierarchy imbalance in the overall UI. Overall proportion is acceptable but tight.
